authority: V42 admits the complete target-free frontier reaching one connected component; it does not choose among retained rows.

composition.contact_shell: generated half-One inclusive to generated adjacent C-alpha One exclusive

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: V41 supplies the complete binary cube; the contact shell is bounded by the generated half-One and One.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: All 8,192 V41 component assignments are evaluated.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: One is the smallest positive graph-component count.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Maximal equal/disagree runs and graph connected components are unique; every row reaching One is retained.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Only sequence, sealed parent states and generated backbone atoms enter; target coordinates and scores are absent.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Runtime halts on parent, block, cube, source, empty-frontier or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: A complete sealed L76 frontier must be compared only after sealing.
